textByHashes.6efcfade9d9d4e5f7eeca8949498f68ccf144e5b: Don't you know? I am a proud Knight of the Lion, serving under the Justiciar of the Lion.
textByHashes.2b126e71724cf304ca1969ef11a29854f0413b0f: And you are the adventurer who disturbed my rest!
textByHashes.af49514a1e53e4c5d53145a425985106c8e55936: Hallowed marks? That currency is reserved only for the devout followers of holy Saradomin. Are you a follower, adventurer?
textByHashes.61f691586db1bbd558992f626b74be40a8d942d8: I see! Yes, I can sense that you at least carry some items bearing his symbol. Well met fellow follower! Do tell, what is the Justiciar of the Lion up to these days?
textByHashes.bd2be11419e23703078d600729a7cddb9faaf958: By Saradomin's mercy! Are you serious adventurer? You've never heard of her glory?
textByHashes.6d22d9b532c5b245e157af86bb2825f1e5aa8c52: The statue in the south east bears her resemblance. I remember the day it was built in her honour.
textByHashes.39832dd1c0b34e77f41e833c46eb258fc0c957e7: The Justiciar of the Lion is a title bestowed upon the most powerful wizard of our order. She was capable of wiping out an entire army of Zamorakian demons with a single spell!
textByHashes.a12463f3ae61b7faab8ad2f460f450809324c1e4: I lament that I could not learn more from her in life but I do not regret for a single instant following her to my grave.
textByHashes.879a209db4332a39459d250494f6b58fa5f3c15c: I was hoping that you could tell me. Last I heard, she was residing in the college here in Hallowvale.
textByHashes.535ae7978a4f34c17fbd1d73f15390b1cdd4c817: You lie adventurer. I do not sense a single item of holy Saradomin on your person.
textByHashes.90321740ec3c9141a05aa27b48946cf5234319c7: To think that our currency is being handled by non- followers. It's a disgrace! If I weren't dead, I'd incinerate you where you stand for your impudence!
textByHashes.0251b347bab7c5d831e21ce7dea9a880bc2e180a: I don't appreciate your attempts at humour, non- follower.
textByHashes.c8aab4cd8911597c4eb34a1d3b27e66a6d006505: You dare defile this sacred place? That treasure doesn't belong to you!
